title: Ken Powers
compiled_truth: Ken Powers is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-15 to 2002-01-29), Ken Powers sent 26 and received 253 emails, totalling 279 interactions. Top correspondents: [Lindy Donoho](people/lindy-donoho) (23), [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (23), [Jeanette Doll](people/jeanette-doll) (22), [Dan Fancler](people/dan-fancler) (21), [Tracy Geaccone](people/tracy-geaccone) (21).
